Sitemap

This page summarizes the published site structure so users can understand where each part of the system lives.

Go to home Contact Rotata
01

Context

Introduction

The site is organized from context to system to action so readers can move from understanding to decision without dead ends.

02

Operating model

Main navigation structure

The primary navigation groups the site around the operating model.

Operating model

10

Context

Navigation guidance

Overview pages explain the model, detail pages explain one capability, and contact routes exist when a diagnostic conversation is the next sensible step.

Use contact if the right route is unclear

Consult

Rotata turns fragmented revenue operations into one operating model that marketing and sales can read, run and improve.
